home.hero.title: Explore Places Around You
home.hero.subtitle: Take a break from daily stress, plan your trip, and explore your favorite destinations together.
home.about.label: About Us
home.about.heading_1: We craft journeys around the world
home.about.heading_2: blending iconic destinations and hidden gems to deliver authentic, memorable experiences.
home.about.p1: Our team of place lovers, local experts, and travel specialists is dedicated to creating unique and meaningful experiences.
home.about.p2: From vibrant cities to calming nature and beaches, we bring the best experience to every journey.
home.about.stat1: Travelers would recommend us to their friends and family.
home.about.stat2: Unique trip plans crafted to showcase the beauty of Indonesia.
home.about.stat3: Average rating of 4.9/5 from hundreds of satisfied customers.
home.popular.label: Popular Trips
home.popular.subtitle: Explore cosmopolitan cities with a blend of culture and dynamic modern life.
home.jastip.label: Latest Personal Shopping
home.jastip.subtitle: Order your dream items from anywhere easily, safely, and conveniently, delivered right to your hands.
home.gallery.label: Gallery
home.gallery.desc: Step into the world through our curated gallery, capturing the beauty, culture, and unforgettable moments of our journeys across the country.
home.contact.label: Contact Us
home.contact.subtitle: Have questions or ideas for your holiday? Reach out to us here and let's make your trip more fun, together!
home.contact.form.name: Name
home.contact.form.email_ph: We'll get back to you here
home.contact.form.message_ph: Tell us the suggestion or help you need
footer.desc: Traveling home and around is no longer a solo journey. Find friends heading your way, share stories, and make every kilometer more fun, together!
admin.home.title: Admin Home
admin.home.subtitle: See who leads in journeys and brings home the best finds.
auth.hero.title: Take a short trip, and let your heart come home too
auth.hero.subtitle: Feel the thrill of limitless adventure with a variety of destinations and activities, from the great outdoors to colorful city tours.

chat.title: Chat Messages
chat.none_open_subtitle: Select a conversation to start chatting.
chat.attach_oversize: Some files were skipped — max 5MB per file.
notif.title: Notifications
notif.subtitle: Everything that happened on your account.
notif.empty_desc: Updates about your trips, jastip and bills will show up here.
notif.pergi_bareng.approved.title: Join request approved
notif.pergi_bareng.approved.body: You are in for :name. You have been added to the group chat.
notif.pergi_bareng.rejected.title: Join request declined
notif.pergi_bareng.rejected.body: Your request to join :name was not approved.
notif.group.joined.title: You joined a group chat
notif.group.joined.body: You were added to the group chat for :name.
notif.order.created.title: Order created
notif.order.created.body.trip: You booked the trip :name for :amount. Finish the payment before it expires.
notif.order.created.body.jastip: You ordered :name for :amount. Finish the payment before it expires.
notif.order.created.body.pergi_bareng: You requested :quantity seat(s) on :name. Waiting for the organizer to approve.
notif.payment.paid.title: Payment received
notif.split_bill.created.title: New shared bill
notif.split_bill.settled.title: A share was paid
notif.split_bill.settled.body: :payer paid :amount for ":title". It has been added to your wallet.
settings.title: Settings
settings.notif_hint: Choose what shows up in your notifications.
settings.notif.pergi_bareng_hint: When your join request is approved or declined, and when someone asks to join yours.
settings.notif.group_hint: When you are added to a trip or pergi bareng group.
settings.notif.order_hint: When you book a trip, jastip or pergi bareng.
settings.notif.payment_hint: When a payment of yours goes through.
settings.notif.split_bill_hint: New shared bills and shares paid to you.
notif.pergi_bareng.requested.title: New join request
notif.pergi_bareng.requested.body: :requester wants :quantity seat(s) on :name. Approve or decline it.
notif.jastip_request.quoted.title: Your request got a quote
notif.jastip_request.quoted.body: The jastiper quoted :amount for :name. Pay to confirm it.
notif.jastip_request.rejected.title: Request declined
notif.jastip_request.rejected.body: The jastiper declined your request for :name.
notif.selling.order_paid.title: Your jastip was paid
notif.selling.order_paid.body: :name has been paid for. Time to buy it.
notif.selling.request_received.title: New jastip request
notif.selling.request_received.body: :requester asked for :quantity x :name. Send them a quote.
settings.notif.jastip_request_hint: Quotes and rejections on requests you sent.
settings.notif.selling_hint: When someone orders from you or asks you for a quote.
